testcase.name: test_multichip_precision_candidate[blackhole-blackhole-1x4-ring]

failure.message: AssertionError: geometry attention_bfp8 key: PCC 0.9921780003249089 is below 0.999 assert False

testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices) record_property = <function record_property.<locals>.append_property at 0x7e15e7e2a020>
@_mesh_test def test_multichip_precision_candidate(mesh_device, record_property): """Cross real-weight projection dtype/fidelity and explicit SDPA policy."""
candidate_id = os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_PRECISION_CANDIDATE") if candidate_id not in PRECISION_CANDIDATES: pytest.skip(f"set MULTICHIP_PRECISION_CANDIDATE to one of {sorted(PRECISION_CANDIDATES)}") > _run_decode_policy_candidate( mesh_device, record_property, candidate_id=candidate_id, changes=PRECISION_CANDIDATES[candidate_id], )
models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:951: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:858: in _run_decode_policy_candidate key_pcc = _measured_pcc( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
reference = tensor([[[[ 0.4746, 0.1484, 0.6914, ..., 1.7109, 0.7695, -0.1914]],
[[-0.4961, -0.0850, 0.0581, ..., -0.6211, -0.7148, 0.2041]],
[[ 0.4629, -0.1846, 0.1406, ..., 0.1045, 0.1895, -0.5820]],
...,
[[-0.4004, -0.2539, -0.5156, ..., 0.9219, -0.5508, -0.5664]],
[[ 0.2598, -0.1689, -0.1216, ..., 0.0076, 0.4980, -0.5938]],
[[ 0.1699, -0.3203, -0.5156, ..., -0.4473, -0.6836, -0.1992]]]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) actual = tensor([[[[ 5.3906e-01, 1.3574e-01, 7.5391e-01, ..., 1.6875e+00, 7.3438e-01, -1.4258e-01]],
[[-4.9023e-01, 8.0566e-03, -4.8828e-04, ..., -5.9375e-01, -7.0703e-01, 2.1191e-01]],
[[ 3.9648e-01, -2.1387e-01, 1.7383e-01, ..., 5.5176e-02, 7.5195e-02, -6.0547e-01]],
...,
[[-4.5312e-01, -2.5195e-01, -4.7070e-01, ..., 9.9219e-01, -6.2109e-01, -4.9805e-01]],
[[ 2.5195e-01, -1.9629e-01, -9.9609e-02, ..., -1.0205e-01, 5.1562e-01, -6.1328e-01]],
[[ 1.1426e-01, -2.7148e-01, -5.1172e-01, ..., -5.0391e-01, -7.0312e-01, -1.5332e-01]]]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) threshold = 0.999, label = 'geometry attention_bfp8 key'
def _measured_pcc(reference, actual, threshold: float, label: str) -> float: passed, value = comp_pcc(reference.float(), actual.float(), pcc=threshold) value = float(value) print(f"{label}: {value}") > assert passed, f"{label}: PCC {value} is below {threshold}" E AssertionError: geometry attention_bfp8 key: PCC 0.9921780003249089 is below 0.999 E assert False
